hotel_description:
Furama Villas Danang is a collection of spacious villas, each featuring its own private swimming pool and free Wi-Fi. Just 1312 feet from Da Nang Beach, the property is also host to 4 restaurants and 2 bars. Guests are offered free taichi classes at the villas.

A 5-minute drive to Marble Mountain, Furama Villas Danang is a 10-minute drive from the city of Da Nang. Danang International Airport is a 15-minute drive away. The UNESCO World Heritage Site of Hoi An is a 20-minute drive from the villas.

Offering pool or ocean views, each double-story villa comes with living and dining areas. A well-equipped kitchen includes a stove, mini-bar and microwave.

Recreation facilities such as tennis and volleyball courts are available. Newspapers and a safety deposit box are provided at the 24-hour reception. Guests can play Poker machines at Club99, which opens from 11:00-04:00.

Café Indochine

Guests can indulge in a wide selection of international and Pan-Asian cuisines in a charming French colonial setting. This is the perfect choice for those seeking both diversity and refinement in their dining experience.

Don Cipriani’s

Serving traditional Italian cuisine, Don Cipriani’s offers authentic flavors of Italy in an elegant atmosphere, ideal for lovers of classic Italian gastronomy.

Hai Van Lounge

One of the resort’s three bars, Hai Van Lounge is renowned for its vibrant nightly performances by Filipino bands, creating an engaging and lively atmosphere for guests.

V-Senses Cafe

Step into a living tribute to Vietnam’s cultural and culinary heritage. Designed in the style of a traditional Northern three-room house with mossy tiled roofs, wooden interiors, and intricate details, V-Senses Cafe blends timeless charm with authentic flavors.
Here, every dish tells a story — from the delicate taste of Hanoi Snail Noodle Soup to the crispy sturgeon in Thai Binh Fish Noodle Soup enhanced with the sweet-sour hint of giấm bỗng. More than just a dining venue, it is a place to connect, experience, and celebrate the very essence of Vietnamese culture.

Steak House The Fan

Once celebrated as one of Danang’s most distinguished beachfront dining destinations, Steak House The Fan is making a triumphant comeback. Known for its premium steaks, impeccable service, and iconic seaside ambiance, the restaurant is set to reclaim its legendary reputation — with a compelling new twist that elevates both tradition and innovation.
Danaksara
The newly opened Danaksara restaurant is named with a combination of the ancient name of the city – “Danak” and a Hebrew feminine word refers to a female minister – “Sara”.

Furama offer Family Room Amenities in room booking with child:
•	Furama Coloring Pages and Crayon Set: Provide one set of Furama-themed coloring pages along with a box of crayons.
•	Mini Monopoly or an Educational Board Game: Place a set of mini Monopoly or another educational board game in the room for family members to enjoy together.
•	Chupa Chups Lollipops: Place 2-3 Chupa Chups lollipops per child in the family group, prepared in a clean and appealing package.
